findings.issue: Automated decision consent flow is not explicitly defined in the provided codebase
findings.recommended_fix: Implement explicit consent flow for automated decisions as per GDPR Article 22

findings.issue: Compliance for Baku launch is not fully verified
findings.recommended_fix: Conduct thorough review of AZ Personal Data Protection Act requirements and ensure compliance before launch

findings.issue: Using AURA score for hiring decisions may expose the platform to legal risks
findings.recommended_fix: Consult with legal experts to assess potential liabilities and implement necessary safeguards

findings.issue: DPAs are in place for Supabase, Google Cloud, and Railway
findings.recommended_fix: Continue to monitor and maintain these agreements

findings.issue: Current ToS may not fully cover AI-generated assessments
findings.recommended_fix: Review and update ToS to explicitly address AI-generated assessments and potential liabilities
